---
title: ""
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: true
comments: false

listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: postcard.ejs  
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  # DO THE RSS https://forbo7.github.io/forblog/posts/7_blog_subscriptions.html
---
